assets.summary: Transform hard-coded structures into configuration-driven designs for better maintainability
代码重构：硬编码→配置驱动，支持动态字段扩展和类型安全访问
assets.content:
Intent: Eliminate hard-coded configuration values and enable dynamic field expansion.

Strategy:
1. Identify all hard-coded configuration structures
2. Design unified key-value config manager
3. Implement type-safe accessors (string, int, bool)
4. Add config file loading (key=value format)

Scope: 1 file (code.c), ~200 lines

Changed files:
- code.c (Config manager implementation)

Outcome: Configuration changes from code recompilation to file edits. Supports dynamic field expansion without code changes.

assets.context: Hard-coded configuration structures limiting flexibility and maintainability
assets.reflection: Configuration-driven design eliminates the need for code changes when modifying configurations
